title: Senior Doctor - Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates!
